form.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an eye-catching winner scoring by a neck in a Grade 4/5 at this track and recording a dynamic 20.45 over the 365m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.comment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an eye-catching winner scoring by a neck in a Grade 4/5 at this track and recording a dynamic 20.45 over the 365m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 365m in 20.67. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 365m at this track at NG level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 365m in 20.67. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 365m at this track at NG level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a NG on April 1 over 320m at Richmond behind Summer Dream beaten one length (18.05). Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a NG on April 1 over 320m at Richmond behind Summer Dream beaten one length (18.05). Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 3 lengths in 20.97, beating Lumeah Taylor. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 2 over 365m at this track behind Hard Style Girl beaten 6 lengths (21.26). Needs to find a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the turn out of the back straight crowded for room and came together.
In the back straight galloped off the heels.
